This has been impacting many of our clients.
And the reason is that Google has implemented a change to the search engine results.
So now, so before the search engine results were broken down by page.
So it was very easy to, for like both Google Search Console and websites like SEMrush and Ahrefs to scrape search results and understand, okay, this is on page one, this page two, this page 10.
But Google Search

Implemented the change, and now those pages are gone, so it's an infinite scroll, and it's causing issues with tracking, so now that's kind of causing the query distributions to, query ranking distributions to kind of be off, so that, I just wanted to kind of flag that, so you don't think that this is like a huge, like something's wrong with your website, it's something that's been happening to other websites as well.
